title: Gradient
description: Animated soft-light gradient with 3 drifting color stops

title: Stars
description: Starfield with rotating layers, customizable colors and speed

title: Geometric
description: Geometric planet with procedural surface patterns

title: Dot Sphere
description: Animated spherical fibonacci dot pattern on a rotating sphere

title: Water
description: TDM Seascape — procedural ocean with volumetric waves

title: black hole sun
description: black hole sun

title: Moon Water
description: Moonlit ocean with a big bright moon, gentle waves, and shimmering reflections

title: Galaxy
description: Milky Way galaxy — dense particle starfield with nebula clouds and galactic core

title: Etherea
description: Cycling font styles per letter with 18 visual patterns

title: Wave
description: Sine displacement per letter with shadow

title: Cascade
description: Tiled rows with wave offsets and alternating colors

title: Digifade
description: Glitch dissolve with horizontal slice displacement

title: Coil
description: Text on spiral rings with 4 shape variants

title: Flag
description: Waving flag surface with 4 wave variants

title: Bricks
description: Grid with animated displacement and 3 pattern variants

title: Spacy
description: Perspective tunnel rows with 4 depth variants

title: 3D Type
description: Layered depth text with parallax perspective, hue gradients, and breathing animation

title: Star Constellation
description: Drifting star particles connected by thin lines, drawn to the mouse

title: Fluid Simulation
description: Navier-Stokes fluid simulation — vorticity confinement, pressure projection, mouse interaction. Port of Pavel Dobryakov's WebGL-Fluid-Simulation.

title: Tesseract
description: 4D hypercube — 16 vertices and 32 edges rotating through four-dimensional space, projected to 3D

title: Shape
description: Rotating geometric shapes with adjustable speed, color, and size. Import your own 3D model.

title: Spinning Heads
description: 3D head gallery with 7 material presets — Standard, Wireframe, Flat, Chrome, Glass, X-Ray, Normal. Auto-loads LeePerrySmith bust or use your own model.

title: Custom Material
description: Custom Three.js ShaderMaterial — paste vertex/fragment GLSL with auto-injected time, mouse, and audio uniforms

title: Cube in Water
description: Chrome cube bobbing on a raymarched ocean — procedural sky, wave reflections, underwater darkening

title: ASCII Matrix
description: Falling columns of ASCII characters — matrix rain with density-mapped glyphs

title: Typewriter
description: Typewriter — characters appear one by one with a blinking cursor

title: ASCII Rain
description: Falling columns of your custom message text — matrix rain using your words

title: Wind
description: Minimal gradient movements — soft drifting color fields like a gentle breeze

title: Dancing Cube
description: SDF raymarched box/octahedron blend — driven by body tracking parameters (rotation, scale, glow, morph, alive)

title: Laser
description: RGB laser globe — swirling neon light blobs with separate R/G/B interference patterns

title: Bars
description: Animated gradient bars with 30 easing functions, adjustable columns and phase

title: Decagon Morph
description: Morphable decagon with 10 vertices — audio-reactive, hand-tracking, or manual control

title: Fluid Pixels
description: Dynamic pixel grid with procedural simplex noise, 3-stop color ramp, and 4 noise styles

title: Flower
description: Ray marched morphing flower with polar coordinate warping and ambient occlusion

title: Stained Glass
description: Morphing stained glass — Voronoi cells with drifting centers, dark lead borders, and luminous colors

title: Color Cube
description: Morphing 3D shape — box, prism, torus, knots with refraction and mouse orbit

title: Electricity
description: Electric arc — simplex noise plasma with glowing discharge line

title: Shapes
description: Icosahedral crystal with refraction — inner morphing solid, Cook-Torrance shading, mouse orbit

title: SoundTemple
description: Bouncing ember particles on a reflective floor — orbiting camera, cycling colors

title: Morphus
description: Smooth-blended raymarched shapes — spheres, cube, torus melting together on a reflective plane

title: Veroni
description: Self-healing voronoi particles advected by fluid simulation — colorful mosaic with mouse interaction

title: Blob
description: Raymarched deformed sphere with sinusoidal distortion, hue control, and fluid 4D animation

title: Squares
description: Cellular Voronoi noise with drifting centers, isolines, and two-tone coloring

title: Robot Arm
description: 2-link inverse kinematics robot arm — follows hand tracking or mouse, pinch to grip

title: Lazer Claw
description: 3 neon claw slashes with inverse-square glow, swipe flash, shimmer, and audio reactivity

title: Lava Lamp
description: Glossy metaballs rising and merging in viscous fluid — lava lamp simulation with audio reactivity

title: La Bloom
description: Never-ending love letter — multi-line text reveals char by char, blooms with warm glow, lingers, dissolves, loops infinitely

title: Balls
description: Metallic spheres with selective Unreal-style bloom — raymarched icosahedron-like balls orbiting in 3D with mouse camera and audio reactivity

title: Particles
description: 75K instanced billboard particles — rainbow HSL cloud with quaternion rotation, sine-wave pulsing, and orbiting camera

title: Crystals
description: 3D crystal gemstone with image refraction — diamond, prism, emerald, obelisk, or cluster shapes with CubeCamera refraction

title: Lightning
description: Recursive black hole — fractal tiled glow rings with cosine palette, depth iterations, mouse warp, and audio reactivity

title: Cornell Box
description: Raymarched Cornell box — bounce lighting, ambient occlusion, movable sphere, and top area light

title: Veroni 3
description: 3D glass Voronoi sphere — morphing panels with neon gradient edges, refraction, image texture, and color control

title: Voxel Flower
description: Raymarched voxel tree with reflective checkerboard floor, animated glow pulses, and orbiting camera

title: Image Mosaic 3D
description: 3D floating image cards from a live feed — connect an Image Feed data source to fill the mosaic with photos

title: Particle Flock
description: Data-driven particle swarm — bind CSV time series or live signals to shape the flock's population, energy, spread, and color

title: Dispersion
description: Chromatic dispersion — refractive color separation driven by animated flow noise, with texture input

title: Diamond
description: Brilliant-cut diamond with anomalous spectral dispersion — 12-wavelength raymarched refraction and total internal reflection

title: Dolphin
description: Raymarched dolphin leaping through ocean waves with caustics, foam, splash effects, and procedural animation

title: Ether
description: Volumetric light tendrils with rotating space distortion and layered glow

title: Trapped
description: Squishy deformable balls bouncing inside a glass box with PBR shading and inverse metaball squishing

title: Draw
description: Interactive painting with emissive glow and 2D light bleeding — click and drag to draw

title: TEE
description: Trusted Execution Environment — data star enters a wireframe enclave, disperses into orbiting particles, reconverges and exits

title: Noisy Texture
description: Multi-color gradient with grainy noise-textured distortion — 7 shape modes including wave, dots, truchet, blob, sphere

title: Sphere Gradient
description: Blinn-Phong shaded sphere with two orbiting light sources and customizable diffuse/specular colors

title: Metaballs
description: Mouse-controlled rotating metaballs with dynamic Blinn-Phong lighting — drag to orbit
